urdu transliteration text:
ASMANE MUJTABA KO JO HIRA PILA DIYA
Mujtaba (Imaam Hassan) was given poison
English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

ASMANE MUJTABA KO JO HIRA PILA DIYA
HIRENE DIL HASSAN KA SERASER KETA DIYA
DERDE JIGER NE KHAWBSE JISDEM JEGA DIYA
BEHNO KO YEH PUKAR KE USMA SUNA DIYA
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Mujtaba (Imam Hassan a.s.) was given poison
The poison was so potent that it cut his liver into pieces
It woke him up from deep sleep
He called out to his sisters to let then know his last wishes

urdu transliteration text:
KUCH AAJ KHUD BA KHUD MERA AHWAL TENG HAI
CHURIYA JIGAR ME CHALTI-HAI AUR SABZ RENG HAI
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
He started by saying “Today all of a sudden my body is in a lot of pain”
“Knives are cutting through my liver - look the colour of my skin has changed”

urdu transliteration text:
BEHNO KHUDA KE WASTE AWO MERI TARAF
BETAB DERD SE HUN MAY IBNE SHAAHE NAJAF
PARDE BHI KUT CHUKE HAY MERE DILKE SAF BE SAF
AFSOS HON CHUKI HAY MERI ZINDAGI TELEF
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
“My sisters do come next here next to me”
I am in a lot of pain” said the son of Shahe Najaf (Imaam Ali)
“I am suffering a lot of pain as if my body is being cut piece by piece”

urdu transliteration text:
MAY BE KELISE KARTA JO AHO FUGHA(n) HUN
MISLE CHIRAGE SUBHE MEY AB MEHMAN HUN
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
“I can see my life is now coming to an end – it is short”
“The person before you is in a lot of pain”
“He is only your guest until tomorrow morning”

urdu transliteration text:
BEHNO NE APNE BHAI KI JISDEM SUNI SEDA
HUJR-E SE ROTI PITTI DAWRI BEREHNA PA
JUHI KARIB AAYI TO WOH DEKHTI HAY KYA
BABAKI TARHAN BHAI HASSAN HAY TARAP RAHA
When Imam’s sisters heard his cry
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
They ran out from their rooms and to him in great haste
When they reached him they saw it with their own eyes
Like is father once he was struck, Imam Hassan was suffering a lot

urdu transliteration text:
KYA ZULM HOGAYA YE DUHAI RASULKI
BERBAD HON CHUKI HAY KAMAI BATUL KI
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
The suffering being endured by the family of Rasul
There is being lost before us - the progeny of Batul 	(Bibi Fatema)

urdu transliteration text:
EHWAL US TAREF THA HASSAN KA NIPAT TEBAH
ZAINAB UDHER TO ROTI THI BHAR BHAR KE SERDE AAH
HAZRAT HASSAN KI PAR GEI ZAINAB PE JO NIGHAH
AY BEHNA SABR KIJIYO BOLA WO DIN-PENAH
On one side Bibi Zainab was crying and sobbing
Imaam Hassan noticed that Bibi Zainab was crying
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Everyone’s focus was on Imaam Hassan as he was suffering
He turned to her and said,”My sister be patient

urdu transliteration text:
EHWAL US TAREF THA HASSAN KA NIPAT TEBAH
ZAINAB UDHER TO ROTI THI BHAR BHAR KE SERDE AAH
HAZRAT HASSAN KI PAR GEI ZAINAB PE JO NIGHAH
AY BEHNA SABR KIJIYO BOLA WO DIN-PENAH
On one side Bibi Zainab was crying and sobbing
Imaam Hassan noticed that Bibi Zainab was crying
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Everyone’s focus was on Imaam Hassan as he was suffering
He turned to her and said,”My sister be patient

urdu transliteration text:
NE PITO SER NE ASHKOSE BHERLAO NAE NEKO
JALDI KHABER KERO MERE BHAI HUSSEIN KO
Don’t cry or be sad now
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text: Just let my brother Hussein know what has just happened”

urdu transliteration text:
ZAINAB NE DEKHA BHAI HASSANKA YE JABKE HAL
KAMBERSE JAKE KEHNE LAGI YUN BASAD MELAL
BAYTHA HAY KYA TU AUR KIDHER HAY TERA KHEYAL
SIJDEME HAY HUSSEIN JO DER YADE ZUL JELAL
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Zainab regained her composure as she realized the enormity
She rushed to Kumber and urgently relayed the message
She said leave what you are doing
And rush to Imaam Hussein who is at Mosque and in prayer

urdu transliteration text:
JA USSE KEHDE TUMSE HASSAN AB HAY CHUUT TA
AWO HUSSEIN BAZU TUMHARA HAY TUUT TA
Tell Imaam Hussein that Imaam Hassan is leaving us
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text: Please rush back as a pillar of the Household is falling.

urdu transliteration text:
YE DUKHTARE BATUL KA SUNKER PAYAME YAS
KAMBER WEHAN SE ROTA CHELA HOKE BEHEWAS
WO NAARAZAN HUSSEIN KE JIS WAKHTE AYA PAAS
RORO PUKARA AYA HUN KARNE KO ILTEMAS
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
When he heard that from the daughter of Batul
Kumber ran as tears were streaming from his eyes
When he reached Imaam Hassan
With tears in his eyes he said “I am here to give you condolences”

urdu transliteration text:
TUK DEKHO CHALKE GHERME KAYAMAT BEPA HAI AAJ
HAZART HASSAN KO ZEHR KISINE DIYA HAI AAJ
“For someone has poisoned Imaam Hassan today”
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text: “Please rush home for it is like Qayamat at home”

urdu transliteration text:
ROYE HUSSEIN KARKE GHIREBAN JO APNA CHAK
KASSIM IDHER URAANE LEGA APNE SAR PE KHAK
HAY HAY HASAN PUKARITHI ZAINAB BE DERDE NAK
AY BHAI MAYBHI KARTIHU APNE TAI HELAK
Imaam Hussein hugged Kumber as he cried too
Kassim (Imaam Hassan’s son) cried too
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
As they reached home they saw Bibi Zainab in tears too
“Oh brother I too feel like I want to leave this world”

urdu transliteration text:
KASSIM KI MAA PUKARI MERA RAZ LUT GEYA
KAMBER PUKARA AKAA MERA MUJSE CHUT GEYA
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Kassim’s Mother cried and said I have lost everything
Kumber cried and said I have lost my Akaa (my  Master)

urdu transliteration text:
SALMA PUKARI ZEHR SE SHABBER HUWA SHAHID
KULSUM ROI MERA BIRADER HUWA SHAHID
KASSIM KI MA PUKARI KE AFSER HUWA SHAHID
MAY BEWA HOGAI MERA SHAWHER HUWA SHAHID
Kassim’s mother also cried – he was a Shahid
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Salma (one of Prophet’s Wives) said that Shabber (Imaam Hassan) was poisoned and was a Shahid (a martyr)
“I am now a widow and my husband was killed in the way of Allah”

urdu transliteration text:
KASSIM NE KHAK PACHARI KAHAN WA MUSIBATA
MAY BEKASO YATIM HUWA WA MUSIBATA
@HujjatELC
Imam Hasan Masrhia – from Masaib e Panjetan
english translation text:
Kassim lamented and said “the troubles are here”
“I am now a yatim (an orphan) and the troubles are here”
